content.full_text:
July 6, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807
Attn: Mary Ann Kvasager

RE: Hawthorne Economic Improvement Committee, File No. A-92-341

Dear Ms. Kvasager,

Per our phone conversation, this letter is a request for written confirmation of advice given to the above ballot measure qualification committee regarding filing requirements. We regret the miscommunication of deadline dates as this caused your letter dated June 24, 1992 to contain inaccurate advice.

Thank you for your assistance in this matter. As usual, we greatly appreciate your patience and understanding.

Sincerely,

Laura S. Seo
Deputy City Clerk
